summary: Learn Page Bug Fixes Testing - All 4 reported bugs VERIFIED FIXED. (1) Tips expand inline with breed-specific advice mentioning pet name 'Mojo' and breed 'Indie'. (2) Guided Learning Paths now open topic modals instead of request form. (3) Products tab shows training products (Puppy Kindergarten, Puppy Training Course) not cakes. (4) Videos tab shows 3 curated video cards with YouTube fallback button. Care page regression test PASSED (19,691 chars loaded).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 Learn page bug fixes verified. Pet Mojo (breed: Indie) used for testing. Learn for Mojo section shows personalized tips that expand INLINE with breed-specific advice. Guided paths open topic modals. Topic modal Products tab shows training products. Videos tab shows curated videos with YouTube search fallback.

bug_fix_1_inline_tips.details: Tips in 'Learn for Mojo' section expand INLINE with breed-specific advice. Tip label shows 'Training tips for Indie'. Expanded advice shows 'Mira's Advice for Mojo' with text mentioning 'Indies are typically intelligent'. NOT opening Mira AI modal.

bug_fix_1_breed_mention.details: Subtitle: 'Advice picked just for your Indie — tap to read'. Tip label: 'Training tips for Indie'. Advice text mentions 'Indies are typically intelligent and respond well to positive reinforcement'

bug_fix_1_pet_name_mention.details: Heading: 'Learn for Mojo'. Advice header: 'Mira's Advice for Mojo'

bug_fix_2_guided_paths_modal.details: Clicking 'New Puppy Path' guided path card opens 'Puppy Basics' topic modal with tabs (Overview, Videos, Products, Services). NOT opening request form.

bug_fix_3_products_tab.details: Products tab in topic modal shows 4 training-related products: 'Puppy Kindergarten (8 Weeks)', 'Puppy Training Course ₹8000', and 2 more products with dog images. NO cakes visible.

bug_fix_4_videos_tab.details: Videos tab shows 3 curated video cards: 'First Week Home - Puppy Training Tips' (Zak George, 12:45), 'House Training Your Puppy' (McCann Dogs, 8:23), 'Puppy Socialization Guide' (Kikopup, 10:15). Also has 'Browse More on YouTube' button as fallback.

topic_modal_tabs_work.details: Topic modal has 4 tabs: Overview, Videos, Products, Services. All tabs are clickable and switch content correctly.

send_to_concierge_button.details: 'Send to Concierge for More Details' button found in topic modal footer. Button is clickable.

care_page_regression.details: Care page at /care loads successfully with 19,691 characters of content. Shows 'Everyday Care for Mojo' personalized header. No crashes or errors.

all_4_tips_visible.details: 4 tips visible in Learn for Mojo section: 'Training tips for Indie', 'Grooming guide', 'Nutrition basics', 'Exercise recommendations'

mocked_apis.youtube_videos: Using curated fallback videos due to YouTube API quota exceeded - functioning as expected per design

screenshots: .screenshots/24_topic_modal.png - Topic modal opened from guided path
